description: In V5 fallback flow, RlmBuilder::build sets extract leaf instruction via render_extract_instruction(...), but RlmExtractSig<S>::instruction() still returns constant EXTRACT_INSTRUCTION. This can drift signature/introspection docs from runtime behavior and make debugging optimizer/facet views confusing. Consider collapsing to one source (either update Signature::instruction to rendered form or avoid builder override and generate through signature path).
title: RLM extract instruction has dual sources of truth
